name: Deploy to Zoho Catalyst

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'functions/**'
      - 'client/**'
      - 'catalyst.json'
      - '.github/workflows/deploy-catalyst.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      target:
        description: 'What to deploy'
        required: true
        default: 'auto'
        type: choice
        options:
          - auto
          - crime-agent
          - analytics
          - client
          - all-safe
          - seeder
      confirm_seeder:
        description: 'Type SEED to confirm seeder deploy (it can truncate tables)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string

concurrency:
  group: catalyst-deploy
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  CATALYST_PROJECT_DIR: .

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changed components
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      crime_agent: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.crime_agent }}
      analytics: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.analytics }}
      client: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.client }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Filter paths
        id: filter
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        with:
          filters: |
            crime_agent:
              - 'functions/crime-agent/**'
            analytics:
              - 'functions/analytics/**'
            client:
              - 'client/**'

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: catalyst-development
    steps:
      - name: Guard seeder deploys
        if: github.event.inputs.target == 'seeder' && github.event.inputs.confirm_seeder != 'SEED'
        run: |
          echo "::error::Seeder deploy requires confirm_seeder=SEED. The seeder can truncate and reload Data Store tables."
          exit 1

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Cache npm
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: npm-catalyst-cli-${{ runner.os }}

      - name: Install Catalyst CLI
        run: |
          npm install -g zcatalyst-cli
          catalyst --version

      - name: Restore Catalyst credentials
        env:
          CATALYST_CREDENTIALS: ${{ secrets.CATALYST_CREDENTIALS }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$CATALYST_CREDENTIALS" ]; then
            echo "::error::CATALYST_CREDENTIALS secret is empty. See scripts/ci-setup.md."
            exit 1
          fi
          mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/zoho-catalyst-cli"
          printf '%s' "$CATALYST_CREDENTIALS" > "$HOME/.config/zoho-catalyst-cli/catalyst-credentials.json"
          chmod 600 "$HOME/.config/zoho-catalyst-cli/catalyst-credentials.json"

      - name: Inject function environment variables
        env:
          GLM_ENDPOINT_URL: ${{ secrets.GLM_ENDPOINT_URL }}
          CAT_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.CAT_ORG_ID }}
          ZOHO_CLIENT_ID: ${{ secrets.ZOHO_CLIENT_ID }}
          ZOHO_CLIENT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.ZOHO_CLIENT_SECRET }}
          ZOHO_REFRESH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.ZOHO_REFRESH_TOKEN }}
        run: python3 scripts/inject_env.py

      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          TARGET="${{ github.event.inputs.target || 'auto' }}"
          ARGS=()

          add() { ARGS+=("--only" "$1"); }

          case "$TARGET" in
            crime-agent) add "functions:crime-agent" ;;
            analytics)   add "functions:analytics" ;;
            seeder)      add "functions:seeder" ;;
            client)      add "client" ;;
            all-safe)    add "functions:crime-agent"; add "functions:analytics"; add "client" ;;
            auto)
              [ "${{ needs.changes.outputs.crime_agent }}" = "true" ] && add "functions:crime-agent"
              [ "${{ needs.changes.outputs.analytics }}"  = "true" ] && add "functions:analytics"
              [ "${{ needs.changes.outputs.client }}"     = "true" ] && add "client"
              ;;
          esac

          if [ ${#ARGS[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "No deployable changes detected. Skipping."
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "Deploying: ${ARGS[*]}"
          catalyst deploy "${ARGS[@]}"

      - name: Smoke test crime-agent
        if: contains(fromJSON('["auto","crime-agent","all-safe"]'), github.event.inputs.target || 'auto')
        env:
          BASE_URL: ${{ secrets.CATALYST_BASE_URL }}
        run: |
          if [ -z "$BASE_URL" ]; then echo "No BASE_URL set, skipping smoke test"; exit 0; fi
          code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/out.json -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$BASE_URL/server/crime-agent/" \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d '{"message":"How many chain snatching cases were registered in Bengaluru City in 2025?","session_id":"ci-smoke"}' \
            --max-time 90 || true)
          echo "HTTP $code"; head -c 600 /tmp/out.json || true
          if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Smoke test did not return 200 (gateway timeouts are expected on cold starts)."
          fi

      - name: Scrub credentials
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f "$HOME/.config/zoho-catalyst-cli/catalyst-credentials.json" || true
          git checkout -- functions/*/catalyst-config.json 2>/dev/null || true
